_about: Reference rates for Taka Compass. The app fetches this file on load. It is refreshed daily by .github/workflows/sync-rates.yml, which runs scripts/sync-rates.mjs.

_sources.sanchayapatra: nationalsavings.gov.bd circular — 5-yr Bangladesh Sanchayapatra, up to 7.5 lakh
_sources.homeLoan: market average under the post-2024 floating regime
_sources.lendingRefWB: World Bank FR.INR.LEND (annual avg lending rate, lagging ~1yr) — pulled live as a reference
_sources.note: Most BD savings/policy rates have no official public JSON API and change via periodic circulars. The sync script keeps the last good value and only overwrites a field when a fetcher returns one. When a new circular lands, you can also just edit the numbers here and redeploy.
